reviews.review_title: the vr version of my little universe
reviews.review_description:
I love this game. I was addicted to the my little universe game on mobile and this is the vr version of that. It’s fun, addictive and entertaining. I did encounter a bug where I wasn’t able to collect the items but going to main menu fixed that.

It would be nice if we have multiple tools like a axe for trees and a pickaxe for stone, but still even without that it is really fun.
Sword feels like a foam bat. Needs upgrades maybe. An item counter would be nice. More options/settings

developer_response.body: Hey, thank you for your review!

reviews.review_description: Nice simple and effective graphics but the game is too easy.  The enemy are no challenge as they can be killed from a distance.

developer_response.body: Hi! You are right the game balance is more for casual players. But we will make sure to make it challenging for advanced players too. The full release is coming this week.  Thank you for your feedback and stay tuned!

reviews.review_description: I like it so far. It feels pretty polished. I can't wait for the full game.

developer_response.body: Hey, thank you for your review! We are working on the next updates, so stay tuned!

reviews.review_description: Beautiful in it's own way, addictive and genuinely fun to play. What are you waiting for?

I love this game so much it has every thing it needs except for the fact that it is very short I beat the game under 30 minutes once the game has is longer or just adding mor worlds/levels right now it is a.  9/10 once it gets at least 2 or3 mor levels it will be a 10/10 even tho it is a short game I still highly recommend edit for got to mention it is 10 times better than the mobile game this game has a lot of potential the day I see it on the oculus store I will try to get it but I will get to the day I see it if it is free

developer_response.body: Hi, thanks for your feedback! We will take this into consideration!

reviews.review_description:
It's a nice, easy, simple game that's lots of fun...can get monotonous to be honest, needs loads adding, only playing the demo atm, not sure if they added a multiplayer mode but that would be great.
I like the chilled game play, the graphics and simple mechanics, I could easily lose a good few hours in this game
Pls make it free!! This is a really great game but the demo is way to shot pls make the full game free I only can play free to play games pls!!!

reviews.review_title: My little universe.. but in vr?!?!?
reviews.review_description: This was one of the best vr games I’ve played and it’s in my top 5 already, definitely recommend for people that don’t like much combat cause there’s not a lot of enemies that spawn, download the game! It’s awesome!
Eee3eeee EEE EEeee EEeee EEeee E￼eeeeeee￼
If your looking for something fun this game is great

The devs responded to my other review, and added left hand support. Very nice. 
And i can see the game had improved alot, main menu. Which i don't remember, all i remember was a small island with a tree. But there's alot more now it seems. 
Music is nice, reminds me of minecraft. 
One thing I'd note is; with the left hand support. Swap the positions of the gun and sword. Having the gun at my left, but when i grip left it picks up the sword is weird and kind of disorienting. 
Besides that, I'd say really good game. It's kind of Iike those mobile Simulator games. Which is really nicely portrayed in VR. 
It's so satisfying cutting down trees with the vibrations and all. 
I'd say 5/5
Also devs of shave and stuff indicated by the main menu? Which I've also played. And that's also a really nice game. I wish the devs luck, they make really great games :p
Polish low poly graphics, easy and fun inmersive action, simply fun for kids.

I would give this a 10 out of 10 if there was hunger bars and stuff to see how much health you have or more levels and I really love that I had little to none bugs/issues I am stuck tho I have 41 of the little things done and can’t find the last two I do with that the portal was used to go to the next island but it just sends me back to the menu i enjoy playing this Vr game 
and I hope to see more updates on these things in the near future

developer_response.body: Hi! Thank you for your detailed feedback! The full release of the game coming with new content this week. So prepare your sword!

reviews.review_description: Very good game to chill

developer_response.body: Hey! Thank you for your review! We are glad to hear that. We will bring more content with the full release of the game which is coming this week! Stay tuned!

reviews.review_description: I think that the game is extremely fun, I played it at the gamescom but beat it in under 30 minutes. It is a fun game and I personally like it, the bosses are a bit easy but still cool. Would recommend.

developer_response.body: Hi! Thank you for your detailed feedback! We will make sure to make the game more challenging and the full release is coming in this week!

reviews.review_description: It’s fun just needs more to do

developer_response.body: Hi! The full release of the game is coming this week. We added more content to the game! Thank you for your feedback!

reviews.review_description: I really liked this game it looks like it has a lot of potential and it is unique. I cannot wait for the full game to come out.

developer_response.body: Hey, thank you for your review! We are working on the next updates, so stay tuned!

reviews.review_description: I Love It

developer_response.body: Hello! Thank you for your feedback!
